description_long: This is a large, cylindrical wooden barrel with a flat, circular top and bottom, reinforced by several evenly spaced metal hoops. The wood staves are vertically aligned, showing a natural grain and weathered texture, suggesting outdoor or industrial use. The top surface is slightly recessed and appears to be sealed, indicating the barrel is closed. One side of the barrel is marked with bold, black stenciled text reading 'NEW YORK', giving it a historical or shipping-related character. The metal bands are slightly tarnished, adding to the aged appearance. The overall construction is robust, suitable for storing or transporting liquids or dry goods in urban or warehouse environments.
description: A large, weathered wooden barrel with metal hoops and 'NEW YORK' stenciled on one side, featuring a sealed, flat top.
description_view_0: The barrel's wooden staves and metal hoops are visible, with the top surface showing some small dark marks.
description_view_1: This view prominently displays the 'NEW YORK' stencil on the side, with wood grain and metal hoops clearly visible.
description_view_2: The side of the barrel is shown with the partial 'ORK' of the stencil visible, emphasizing the curvature and banding.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the barrel is visible, showing unmarked wood and the continuation of the metal hoops.
